{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2083 prohibits the use of ratepayer funds in criminal or civil settlement agreements where a utility has been deemed negligent in starting a fire.",
    "California suffered an unprecedented number of wildfires caused by utilities in the last five years.",
    "Charging ratepayers for a utility's negligence in causing wildfires is unethical.",
    "AB 2083 closes a loophole in utility liability for sparking fires.",
    "PG&E agreed to expedite direct payments for home loss and increased performance commitments as part of the settlement over the Dixie Fire.",
    "If PG&E had been convicted for starting the wildfires, all penalties would be paid back from profits."
  ]
